mapper.select:
SELECT maNhanVien, hoTen, cmnd, soDienThoai FROM nhanvien where 1=1
AND (hoTen LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR soDienThoai LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY maNhanVien DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM nhanvien where 1 = 1
AND (hoTen LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR soDienThoai LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nhanvien (hoTen, cmnd, soDienThoai) VALUES (#{hoTen}, #{cmnd}, #{soDienThoai})
